title: Tiran: Mati di Ranjang
overview: Diana and Gugun is a married couple who just bought a new house. They are busy looking for various kind of furniture to fill up their new home. One of the most important furniture is the bed. After the bed was placed in their new home, strange and unusual events started to occur.
